news.title:
CLSA turns bullish on Indian equities, citing reduced geopolitical risks, valuations below 10-year averages, and improved risk-reward profiles.
Portfolio changes include exiting IT for defence, trimming Bajaj Auto/M&M, raising financials, and preferring Bajaj Finance over IndusInd Bank.
news.summary:
CLSA turns bullish on Indian equities, citing reduced geopolitical risks, valuations below 10-year averages, and improved risk-reward profiles.
Portfolio changes include exiting IT for defence, trimming Bajaj Auto/M&M, raising financials, and preferring Bajaj Finance over IndusInd Bank.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed IndusInd Bank's Certificate of Deposits rating at CARE A1.
The INR 100 billion rating reflects stability with no change in credit outlook.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed IndusInd Bank's Certificate of Deposits rating at CARE A1.
The INR 100 billion rating reflects stability with no change in credit outlook.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank's board will meet on April 24, 2026, to approve FY26 results and consider dividend.
The trading window for IndusInd Bank securities remains closed until April 26, 2026.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank's board will meet on April 24, 2026, to approve FY26 results and consider dividend.
The trading window for IndusInd Bank securities remains closed until April 26, 2026.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank opened 4.49% higher on 8 April 2026, showing strong sentiment.
The rise aligns with broader positive trends in private sector banking.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank opened 4.49% higher on 8 April 2026, showing strong sentiment.
The rise aligns with broader positive trends in private sector banking.

news.title:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.
news.summary:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.

news.title:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.
news.summary:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.

news.title:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.
news.summary:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank's Q4FY26 deposits fell 2.6% YoY to ₹4,00,178 crore.
Advances also declined YoY despite sequential improvement in liabilities.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank's Q4FY26 deposits fell 2.6% YoY to ₹4,00,178 crore.
Advances also declined YoY despite sequential improvement in liabilities.

news.title:
Indusind Bank discloses debt securities: Rs 1,500 Cr (7.6%, 2026) and Rs 2,800 Cr (8.11%, 2031).
Both debenture issues are listed on NSE as of March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Indusind Bank discloses debt securities: Rs 1,500 Cr (7.6%, 2026) and Rs 2,800 Cr (8.11%, 2031).
Both debenture issues are listed on NSE as of March 31, 2026.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank discloses pledge creation by promoters under SEBI's Substantial Acquisition regulations.
The bank uploaded disclosures on its website, including reasons and regulation-specific details.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank discloses pledge creation by promoters under SEBI's Substantial Acquisition regulations.
The bank uploaded disclosures on its website, including reasons and regulation-specific details.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank states SFIO probe on accounting issues was disclosed.
Bank says no info on SFIO summons; commits to compliance, transparency.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank states SFIO probe on accounting issues was disclosed.
Bank says no info on SFIO summons; commits to compliance, transparency.

news.title:
Catalyst Trusteeship disclosed creating encumbrance on 50.3M IndusInd Bank shares under SEBI regulations.
Encumbrance secures a $1.45B loan involving J.P. Morgan, Barclays, Citi, Deutsche Bank as lenders.
news.summary:
Catalyst Trusteeship disclosed creating encumbrance on 50.3M IndusInd Bank shares under SEBI regulations.
Encumbrance secures a $1.45B loan involving J.P. Morgan, Barclays, Citi, Deutsche Bank as lenders.

news.title:
Indusind Bank promoters released pledged shares, 7.67% of total shares.
Promoter holding at 15.08%; pledges with Barclays, Deutsche for loan/security.
news.summary:
Indusind Bank promoters released pledged shares, 7.67% of total shares.
Promoter holding at 15.08%; pledges with Barclays, Deutsche for loan/security.

news.title: IndusInd Bank reports under SEBI Takeover Regulations (2011) as per Regulation 29(3).
news.summary: IndusInd Bank reports under SEBI Takeover Regulations (2011) as per Regulation 29(3).

news.title:
IndusInd Bank Ltd. is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of 18 March 2026.
Analysis reflects IndusInd Bank's current fundamentals and performance as of 30 March 2026.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank Ltd. is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of 18 March 2026.
Analysis reflects IndusInd Bank's current fundamentals and performance as of 30 March 2026.

news.title: IndusInd Intl Holdings released its pledge on 4.1% equity in IndusInd Bank.
news.summary: IndusInd Intl Holdings released its pledge on 4.1% equity in IndusInd Bank.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank fell 3.4% this week, closing at Rs.791.85, underperforming Sensex (-1.46%).
The week saw sharp intraday lows, higher derivatives OI, and valuation shifts amid market volatility.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank fell 3.4% this week, closing at Rs.791.85, underperforming Sensex (-1.46%).
The week saw sharp intraday lows, higher derivatives OI, and valuation shifts amid market volatility.

news.title: RBI may alter IndusInd Bank's board after over a year of hedging scandal.
news.summary: RBI may alter IndusInd Bank's board after over a year of hedging scandal.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank saw Rs. 44.4 crore NSE block trade for 559,654 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 792.5 per share.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank saw Rs. 44.4 crore NSE block trade for 559,654 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 792.5 per share.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank's Siddharth Banerjee resigns as Head of Global Markets Group citing personal reasons.
Vasudeva Konda, ex-ICICI Bank executive, appointed as new Head of Global Markets Group effective March 23, 2026.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank's Siddharth Banerjee resigns as Head of Global Markets Group citing personal reasons.
Vasudeva Konda, ex-ICICI Bank executive, appointed as new Head of Global Markets Group effective March 23, 2026.
